name: zsnd_snapshot_stop_all_if_playing
description: zSndPlayHandleSnapshot::StopAllIfPlaying walks captured snapshot nodes and stops active backend voices.
known_limits: VC6 full-zsnd_play.cpp COFF byte compare fails with 27 unmasked mismatches (BN 134 bytes vs VC6 144 bytes, 10 trailing VC6 NOPs trimmed).

The backend dispatch, stack GetStatus scratch at [esp+0xc], vtable call offsets, and StopIfActive call shape match after relocation masking; remaining drift is limited to the branchless list sentinel predicates.
VC5SP3 full-zsnd_play.cpp probe is worse at 100 unmasked mismatches.
